data.body: 3 tickets (555e/2f8e/9a5a) failed completion-verifier on AC-vs-test gaps: AC named the happy file / required assertions my held-out companion had. STRENGTHENED all 3 (555e: single-culprit+ambiguous blame tests into happy file; 2f8e: combined two-bug end-to-end assert exactly 1 link; 9a5a: assert value-entry lens/source/confidence + unavailable reason). Cherry-pick/rebase amended 555e/2f8e/9a5a (Change-Ids preserved), 6 strengthened tests pass, pushed amended stack (829-835 new patchsets, CI re-running). Re-closing the 3.
